failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item priced at $46.13, and produced an incorrect answer saying there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked which available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle costs more than $45.76. The tool result at index 3 returned one matching item: item_id 1096508426, available=true, difficulty level=beginner, price=46.13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, claiming no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not corrected later.
